title: lonicera villosa var. calvescens
intro: Lonicera villosa var. calvescens, also known as the hairy honeysuckle, is a plant species in the family Caprifoliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lonicera villosa var. calvescens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or by macerating them in a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
